response: Thank you for your email. Today's event was indeed very interesting, and both the children, parents, and our teachers enjoyed the rare opportunity. The positive outcome was largely due to your excellent ideas, our team's quick responses, and the默契 (cooperative) support provided. Most importantly, every member of the team genuinely wanted the event to be a success. As you mentioned, there were many areas for improvement, and to prevent similar issues in the future, I request that every teacher in the K2 team conduct a summary and reflection. Additionally, we should develop effective solutions to ensure such issues do not recur, aiming to enhance the overall quality of our school.
